understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to solve each level by positioning every selectable piece onto the goal tiles marked with a '+' so that all goals are occupied simultaneously, triggering a WIN for the level and ultimately completing all levels to win the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement operated on a grid with a limited step budget; the currently selected piece could be moved using directional actions, while CLICK actions targeted specific coordinates to either select a different piece or attempt to move/interact at that location depending on the rules. Walls/obstacles blocked movement (resulting in no position change), and only valid unobstructed moves updated the piece position; success required coordinating multiple pieces to occupy multiple goal tiles at the same time.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to solve each level by positioning every selectable piece onto the goal tiles marked with a '+' so that all goals are occupied simultaneously, triggering a WIN for the level and ultimately completing all levels to win the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement operated on a grid with a limited step budget; the currently selected piece could be moved using directional actions, while CLICK actions targeted specific coordinates to either select a different piece or attempt to move/interact at that location depending on the rules. Walls/obstacles blocked movement (resulting in no position change), and only valid unobstructed moves updated the piece position; success required coordinating multiple pieces to occupy multiple goal tiles at the same time.
